name: host-context-observed-persists
description: Client iframe echoes the `McpUiHostContext` it received from `ui/initialize` via `host_context_observed` WS message (Client→Server). Server projects to `HostContextProjection` and persists on `Session.hostContext`. Persisted projection is observable via subsequent `ggui_handshake` and `ggui_consume` output. Field shape: `availableDisplayModes`, `displayMode`, `theme` — sourced verbatim from the spec-compliant host's `_meta.ui.host` projection. Stale-snapshot guard: a later `host_context_observed` overwrites earlier values.

expectedBehavior.reason: host_context_observed has no synchronous response — the side effect is `Session.hostContext` mutation observable via subsequent ggui_consume / handshake output.
